hero.title: Xcash Gateway
hero.description: Xcash is a self-hosted cryptocurrency payment gateway. Accept payments, manage deposits & withdrawals with full control over your private keys.

items.title: Invoice Payments
items.description: Create invoices with auto-generated payment pages. Multi-currency pricing with crypto settlement.

items.title: Deposit Management
items.description: Unique deposit addresses per customer via BIP44 HD wallet derivation. Configurable confirmations.

items.title: Withdrawals
items.description: On-demand withdrawals with optional 2-tier review workflow. Daily limits and risk controls.

items.title: Multi-Chain
items.description: All EVM networks out of the box. Native Bitcoin support. Add new chains via RPC configuration.

items.title: Webhook Events
items.description: Async event delivery with automatic retry. Idempotent nonce-based deduplication.

items.title: Self-Custody
items.description: Private keys never leave your infrastructure. Isolated signer service with HD wallet derivation.

items.title: One-Click Deploy
items.description: Docker Compose deployment with Traefik reverse proxy. Automated environment initialization.

items.title: Auto Consolidation
items.description: Automatic fund sweeping when thresholds are reached. Configurable intervals and USD triggers.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Get Xcash Up and Running in Minutes

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: Clone the repo, run init_env.sh to generate secrets, then docker compose up -d to launch the full stack.

steps.title: Login & Configure
steps.description: A default admin account (admin / Admin@123456) is created on first launch. Log in, bind OTP, change the password, then fill in RPC endpoints under Chain Management.

steps.title: API Integration
steps.description: Follow the API reference to integrate payments, deposits, and withdrawals via REST. Webhooks deliver on-chain events in real-time.

codePreview.label: Integration
codePreview.title: Simple REST API.
codePreview.description: Xcash provides clean RESTful endpoints with HMAC authentication. Create invoices, generate deposit addresses, and process withdrawals with just a few API calls. Real-time webhooks keep your backend in sync.

security.label: Security
security.title: Built for Zero-Trust Architecture
security.description: In Xcash, security isn't an afterthought — it's the foundation. The isolated signer architecture ensures your private keys never touch the payment processing layer, while HMAC authentication and IP whitelisting protect every API call.

items.title: Isolated Signer
items.description: Signing service runs independently with its own database. Private keys are completely isolated from the payment logic.

items.title: HD Wallet Derivation
items.description: BIP44-based hierarchical deterministic wallets. Unique addresses per customer without on-chain registration.

items.title: HMAC Authentication
items.description: All API requests are authenticated with HMAC-SHA256 signatures. IP whitelisting for additional protection.

items.title: Self-Hosted
items.description: Deploy on your own infrastructure. No third-party custody. Your keys, your coins, your rules.

items.title: Risk Controls
items.description: Configurable withdrawal limits, 2-tier review workflows, and daily transaction caps per merchant.

items.title: Open Source Audit
items.description: Fully open source under MIT License. Inspect every line of code. Community-reviewed security.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Pay Once, Upgrade Forever
pricing.description: No monthly subscription, no hidden costs, no revenue sharing. Zero platform fees on self-hosted.
pricing.overageNote: Usage beyond the monthly free quota is charged a flat 1% fee

footer.description: Open source crypto payment gateway. Your keys, your coins, your rules.
footer.copyright: Xcash. Open source under MIT License.
